name: the-grounds
description: Estate-themed plugins for the gentleman's digital estate

plugins.name: belfry
plugins.description: Apple Calendar and Reminders integration for Claude Code via EventKit

plugins.name: gazette
plugins.description: AI-powered news intelligence for Claude Code — RSS feeds with LLM summarization

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: System health monitoring — CPU, memory, disk, battery, network, git, Dependabot, Docker

plugins.name: steward
plugins.description: File and desktop organization — rules-based sorting, duplicate detection, stale file cleanup

plugins.name: quartermaster
plugins.description: Inventory and shopping list management — usage tracking, restock alerts, Apple Reminders sync

plugins.name: courier
plugins.description: Apple Mail integration — read, compose, and send email without leaving the terminal
